feat.name: World-Wise Vigilance
feat.text: Your keen study of other cultures gives you insights into the ways those cultures fight. When you use Perception to roll initiative and none of your enemies have the elf trait, you can choose to roll Society instead.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.
